title: Real-graph skeleton transplant corpus cell
description: Committed transplant models — real app module-graph skeletons extracted during one ordinary build, reduced to their order-relevant core, anonymized, and emitted as fuzzer-schema ProgramModels at the current schema (no names, paths, or code — only m<index> ids). Each app carries a pure-order BASELINE (organic chunking shaped like the app's real chunks, green on a correct bundler) and a family-A OVERLAY variant (a split-read star-barrel conjunction that reds a buggy bundler in both wrap modes and returns to green when fixed). Regenerated per real-app sweep by scripts/transplant/build-models.ts. See .agents/docs/transplant-cell.md.

greenTarget.note: PR-10104 strict-order arc snapshot (fixed). Override with TRANSPLANT_GREEN_TARGET.

buggyTarget.note: rolldown 1.1.5 snapshot — provably contains bug families A and B. Override with TRANSPLANT_BUGGY_TARGET.

expectedRedSignature: bundle-only-crash:["Error","Execution event value must be a primitive JSON value"]
